subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath been and shall ever be even as He hath been, and He it is Who hath bestowed bounty and honor, Who hath guided and taught [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی کان و یکون بمثل ما قد کان و هو الذی انعم و اکرم و عرف و علم
subcodes.subjects: @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
